hero.headline: Crystal Resort Korat
hero.subheadline: Boutique & Budget Resort & Café next to The Mall Korat
hero.tag: RESORT NEXT TO THE MALL KORAT

amenities.title: Amenities
amenities.description: At Crystal Resort Korat we offer about 80 tasteful guest rooms in boutique modern style with good quality of amenities you need. Although the room accommodations vary, each room is fully equipped with 32" (or bigger) flat screen TV with cable channels, refreshing with coffee set, air conditioner, private bathroom and a large cozy bed for your perfect rest. Besides, wireless high speed internet access, parking lots, 24-hour reception and security are provided for your convenience.

suite.name: Suite
suite.label: Great for Family
suite.amenities: Newly Renovated in 2025 • Living Room/ Bedroom • King-size bed • Free Wi-Fi • Sofa set • Air-conditioner • Hot water • Two Smart Flat screen TVs • Cable TV 80 channels • Refrigerator • Microwave • Bathroom amenity set • Towels & toiletries • Hair dryer • Laundry & cleaning service

cafe.title: Our Café
cafe.socialMedia: FB : crystalcafe.korat ,  IG: crystalcafekorat, Tiktok : crystalcafekorat
cafe.description: Crystal Cafe serves drinks, bakery items, and fresh homemade food. The cafe uses ingredients grown by ourselves or sourced from Nakhon Ratchasima province, which are quality and pesticide-free. Coffee beans are carefully selected and specially roasted for Crystal Cafe, so customers can enjoy delicious, quality, and safe food.
cafe.conceptText: At our working country estate, food is the edible thread that ties all our endeavours together. Our café showcases fresh, seasonal fare, lovingly prepared by our talented chefs.

location.title: Map and Location
location.intro: Crystal Resort Korat is ideally located right next to The Mall Korat, offering quick access to hospitals, shopping centers, and cultural attractions around Nakhon Ratchasima.
location.gettingHere: Crystal Resort Korat is ideally located right next to The Mall Korat, offering quick access to hospitals, shopping centers, and cultural attractions around Nakhon Ratchasima.
location.address: 1268/1 Mittraphap Rd. Naimuang, Muang, Nakorn Ratchasima 30000

location.fromSuvarnabhumi: From Suvarnabhumi Airport: By taxi – approximately 3 hours 15 minutes
location.fromDonmuang: From Don Muang Airport: By taxi – approximately 3 hours
location.nearbyPlaces: The Mall Korat, Ya Mo, Save One Night Market, Terminal 21, Phimai
